content.question: Which alternative operational models (multigrade pedagogy, shared specialist services, network schools, digital-blended delivery) have been successfully implemented and sustained in rural schools in Finland or other comparable countries, and what prerequisites did they require?
content.reduction_path: Systematic review of Nordic and Central European peer-reviewed literature (2010–2025) on rural school viability models, extracting implementation steps, staffing, infrastructure, and sustainability data; supplemented by practitioner interviews from 2–3 countries operating active small-school networks.
